fx-accounts-ping-release-rollout-2.userFacingDescription: Enable sending the Fx Accounts ping.

unified-api-for-spocs-and-top-sites-cont.userFacingName: Unified API for spocs and top sites - controlled rollout for release 133+
unified-api-for-spocs-and-top-sites-cont.userFacingDescription: We're switching to a new endpoint for the services supplying sponsored content and top sites to the new tab. This is a controlled rollout for 133 on the Release channel to that new endpoint.

hnt-weather-with-location-selector-non-e.userFacingDescription: Providing weather widget on the newtab to more countries

desktop-credit-card-autofill-global-enab.userFacingName: Desktop Credit Card Autofill Global Enablement Rollout (Release)

fast-udp-for-firefox-treatment-fast-udp-.userFacingName: Fast UDP for Firefox - Treatment Fast UDP Release Rollout
fast-udp-for-firefox-treatment-fast-udp-.userFacingDescription: Fast UDP for Firefox's QUIC HTTP3 I/O.

enforce-crlite-results-and-limit-use-of-.userFacingDescription: CRLite is a privacy-preserving tool for checking the revocation status of TLS certificates. This rollout disables OCSP in favor of CRLite for most certificates.

context-id-rotation-every-3-days.userFacingDescription: To help further reduce long-lived unique identifiers in Firefox Desktop, we want to begin regenerating the context ID every 3 days.

new-tab-content-ping-rest-of-world-rollo.userFacingName: New Tab content ping (rest of world rollout)
new-tab-content-ping-rest-of-world-rollo.userFacingDescription: We are testing sending of New Tab interaction events in the OHTTP (Oblivious HTTP) protocol, which better preserves user anonymity.

long-term-holdback-2026-growth-desktop.userFacingDescription: Long-term holdback for 2025 H1 Growth experiments

enable-ohttp-for-mars-communications-on-.userFacingName: Enable OHTTP for MARS communications on Release
enable-ohttp-for-mars-communications-on-.userFacingDescription: Enables OHTTP for communicating with MARS from New Tab on Firefox Release.

pin-frequently-used-websites-promo-rollo.userFacingName: Pin Frequently Used Websites - Promo Rollout, Day 3+ users, All Locales
pin-frequently-used-websites-promo-rollo.userFacingDescription: This rollout recommends users with profiles older than 3 days to try out pinned tabs as a way to keep frequently used websites within reach.

upgraded-sidebar-rollout-without-messagi.userFacingDescription: This experiment introduces the sidebar toolbar button to the users' interface.

ai-chatbot-page-summarization-mvp-treatm.userFacingName: AI Chatbot Page Summarization MVP - treatment-a-callout-badge Rollout V4

enable-enrollment-status-telemetry-for-f.userFacingName: Enable Enrollment Status Telemetry for Firefox Desktop (via nimbusTelemetry)

disable-legacy-spoc-ping-by-default.userFacingName: Disable legacy spoc ping by default
disable-legacy-spoc-ping-by-default.userFacingDescription: Disables a legacy Glean ping that is no longer being used or actively monitored for changes.

multiple-profile-switching-rollout-messa.userFacingName: Multiple Profile Switching Rollout Messages only
multiple-profile-switching-rollout-messa.userFacingDescription: This feature makes it easier to create and manage different profiles.  This allows you to separate and protect your online life with a set of unique personal and task-based identities, created and defined by you, all in Firefox.

split-view-onboarding-rollout.userFacingDescription: This onboarding message encourages users to try the new Split View feature, which is helpful for multitasking and viewing two sources of information side by side.

private-window-visual-refresh-design-cha.userFacingName: Private Window Visual Refresh (design change only)

local-network-access-rollout-151-all-use.userFacingName: Local Network Access Rollout 151 All users 10%
local-network-access-rollout-151-all-use.userFacingDescription: Rollout of the Local Network Access feature. New "loopback-network" and "local-network" permissions for allowing websites to access user devices and local networks. Users receive prompts when public websites attempt local machine or network access.

smart-shortcuts-v4p1-rollout.userFacingDescription: Uses shortcut interactions on newtab page to improve shortcut ranking.

built-in-vpn-messaging-evergreen.userFacingDescription: Onboarding CFRs for the built-in VPN

da.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Få ekstra privatliv ved at vælge mellem flere placeringer, så du kan skjule, hvor du browser.
da.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Slå funktionen til for at beskytte dit privatliv bedre på nettet. Få ubegrænset båndbredde og flere placeringer at browse fra. Fra nu og indtil den 31. august.

de.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Holen Sie sich Extra-Privatsphäre und wählen Sie aus mehreren Standorten, um Ihren tatsächlichen Standort zu verstecken.
de.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Aktivieren Sie es, um privater zu surfen. Holen Sie sich unbegrenzte Bandbreite und mehr Standorte, von denen aus Sie surfen können. Jetzt bis zum 31. August

fi.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Paranna yksityisyyttäsi valitsemalla useista eri sijainneista, jotta selaustietosi pysyvät salassa.
fi.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Laita se päälle pitääksesi selaustietosi yksityisinä. Rajaton kaistanleveys ja uusia sijainteja, joista valita. Nyt 31. elokuuta asti.

fr.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Profitez d’encore plus de confidentialité en choisissant un emplacement parmi tous ceux disponibles pour masquer l’endroit depuis lequel vous naviguez.
fr.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Activez-le pour protéger votre navigation. Profitez d’une bande passante illimitée et d’un choix encore plus large d’endroits depuis lesquels naviguer. Dès aujourd’hui et jusqu’au 31 août.

it.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Aumenta la tua privacy scegliendo tra varie località per non svelare da dove navighi.
it.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Attivala per navigare in modo più riservato. Goditi una banda illimitata e più località da cui navigare. Da oggi fino al 31 agosto.

ja.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: 複数の場所から選んで、ブラウズしている場所を秘密にすることで、プライバシーを保護しましょう。
ja.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: オンにしてブラウジング活動のプライバシーを守りましょう。帯域幅は無制限で、より多くの地域が選べます。今から 8 月 31 日まで。

nl.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Kies uit verschillende locaties om te verbergen waar u surft, voor extra privacy.
nl.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Schakel deze functie in om uw privacy beter te beschermen. Profiteer van onbeperkte bandbreedte en meer locaties om uit te navigeren. Nu tot 31 augustus.

pl.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Zyskaj więcej prywatności, ukrywając się w jednej z wielu lokalizacji.
pl.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Włącz, aby zachować więcej prywatności w internecie. Zyskaj nielimitowaną przepustowość i większy wybór lokalizacji. Od teraz do 31 sierpnia.

th.ipprotection-not-now-dropdown-menuitem: ไม่ใช่ตอนนี้
th.ipprotection-no-thanks-dropdown-menuitem: ไม่ ขอบคุณ
th.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: รับ ความเป็นส่วนตัวเพิ่มขึ้น ด้วยการเลือกจากหลากหลายตำแหน่งที่ตั้งเพื่อซ่อนตำแหน่งการท่องเว็บของคุณ
th.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: เปิดใช้งานเพื่อให้การท่องเว็บของคุณเป็นส่วนตัวยิ่งขึ้น รับแบนด์วิดท์ไม่จำกัด และตำแหน่งที่ตั้งเพิ่มเติมเพื่อใช้ท่องเว็บ ตั้งแต่วันนี้จนถึง 31 สิงหาคม

en-CA.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Get extra privacy by choosing from multiple locations to hide where you browse
en-CA.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Turn it on to keep your browsing more private. Get unlimited bandwidth and more locations to browse from. Now until August 31.

en-GB.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Get extra privacy by choosing from multiple locations to hide where you browse
en-GB.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Turn it on to keep your browsing more private. Get unlimited bandwidth and more locations to browse from. Now until August 31.

en-US.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Get extra privacy by choosing from multiple locations to hide where you browse
en-US.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Turn it on to keep your browsing more private. Get unlimited bandwidth and more locations to browse from. Now until August 31.

es-ES.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Disfrute de privacidad extra eligiendo entre varias ubicaciones para ocultar desde dónde navega.
es-ES.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Actívela para navegar con más privacidad. Disfrute de un ancho de banda ilimitado y de más ubicaciones desde las que navegar. Ahora hasta el 31 de agosto.

es-MX.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Obtén privacidad adicional eligiendo entre distintas ubicaciones para ocultar dónde navegas.e
es-MX.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Actívala para que tu navegación sea más privada. Obtén ancho de banda ilimitado y más ubicaciones para navegar. A partir de ahora y hasta el 31 de agosto.

pt-PT.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Obtenha mais privacidade ao escolher entre várias localizações para ocultar onde navega.
pt-PT.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Ligue-a para manter a sua navegação mais privada. Obtenha largura de banda ilimitada e mais localizações para navegar. Agora até 31 de agosto.

sv-SE.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: Förbättra integriteten genom att välja bland flera platser för att dölja var du surfar.
sv-SE.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: Aktivera den för att göra ditt surfande mer privat. Få obegränsad bandbredd och fler platser att surfa från. Nu fram till 31 augusti.

ja-JP-macos.ipprotection-feature-introduction-link-t: 複数の場所から選んで、ブラウズしている場所を秘密にすることで、プライバシーを保護しましょう。
ja-JP-macos.ipprotection-feature-introduction-text-s: オンにしてブラウジング活動のプライバシーを守りましょう。帯域幅は無制限で、より多くの地域が選べます。今から 8 月 31 日まで。

vertical-tabs-promo-rollout-day-3-profil.userFacingDescription: This rollout offers users to try vertical tabs.

holdback-aa.userFacingDescription: This is an A/A holdback experiment to validate that automated weekly analysis reruns correctly — with a growing enrollment window and 21-day observation period — until the experiment is manually ended.

account-adoption-callout-passwords-globa.userFacingDescription: Rollout:  Account Adoption Callout for Password Users

restore-chips-133.userFacingDescription: Re-enable Cookies Having Independent Partitioned State (CHIPS)

hnt-wattle-world-cup-live-timing-rollout.userFacingDescription: Releasing new World Cup Live Timing via rollout

hnt-wattle-ncm-non-eu-english-widgets-ro.userFacingDescription: Rollout of productivity and new widgets

hnt-wattle-ncm-potd-widget-rollout.userFacingName: HNT Wattle / NCM POTD Widget Rollout
hnt-wattle-ncm-potd-widget-rollout.userFacingDescription: Rollout of productivity and new widgets
